scope: B9.0 prospective randomized-audit contract DESIGN -- protocol snapshot. Development-only, NO scientific claim, NO power claim, NOT validation, NO tag. B9.0 = protocol + schema + exact-null + state-machine + dry-run ONLY.
authorized: reviewer-authorized 2026-07-07 after B8.3 (INSUFFICIENT): the B8 emulator line proved post-hoc label balancing on an observed/generated Y cannot remove the collider. B9 moves label/class balance + condition randomization INTO the acquisition contract.

estimand.inside: under a pre-randomized, class-balanced, within-block audit contract, detect condition-specific boundary/interaction evidence (a C x Z interaction in decoding the PRE-ASSIGNED class Y_design) beyond known randomization variation
estimand.outside_refuse: natural-prevalence certification; any dataset with a genuine prior shift P(Y_design|C); covariate confounding violating balance; condition not randomized/counterbalanced -> CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_OUT_OF_ESTIMAND (a REFUSAL, not an analysis-time repair)

contract.Y_design: a PRE-ASSIGNMENT cue/task/stimulus class fixed BEFORE recording -- NOT an observed/generated post-hoc label (the single difference from B8.3)
contract.C: condition, randomized/counterbalanced within subject x microblock (NOT a session/subject label)
contract.balance: within each subject x microblock, C x Y_design cell counts equal (recommended microblock = randomized-order quadruplet {(0,0),(0,1),(1,0),(1,1)} x R)
contract.timing: assignment table generated + hashed BEFORE recording

enforced_by_code: valid hash-pinned table exists + hash integrity
PROVENANCE ATTESTATION manifest.generated_before_recording AND manifest.Y_design_pre_assignment both True
ADHERENCE: executed FULL tuple (C, Y_design, subject, microblock) == registered table row-for-row (anti-p-hacking on BOTH randomized factors)
executed C x Y_design balance + no prior shift + randomization support (Z/T-blind)
enforcement_vs_attestation.attested_by_B9_1_protocol: data-level provenance (was the table truly generated before recording; is Y_design truly the pre-assigned cue) is INHERENTLY UNVERIFIABLE from (C,Y_design,Z); the boolean manifest attestation is the enforceable floor, the real guarantee is the B9.1 acquisition protocol
enforcement_vs_attestation.note: B9 without adherence + provenance binding would be DECORATIVE -- it is the single property distinguishing B9 from the B8 line (hardened over 2 design red-team rounds; see b9_stage0_redteam_checks.json)

exact_null: resample C* ONLY within the predeclared randomization set = uniform permutation of C within each (subject, microblock, Y_design) stratum (preserves C x Y_design balance; Y_design pre-assignment => collider-free CONDITIONAL on genuine within-stratum randomization of executed trials -- Z-dependent balance-preserving attrition is out of reach of the Z-blind validator, excluded by the B9.1 protocol); recompute the SAME B3 contrast T(Y_design, Z, C*). NO fitted Y|Z, NO fitted C|Z propensity, NO selection on Z.
alert_conjunction: B9_CONCEPT_ALERT iff contract valid AND estimable (n_exact_invalid <= 0.20*n_boot) AND p_meanT <= 0.025 AND p_stud <= 0.025 AND n_eligible >= 20. (B9.0 drops the B3 subject-consistency LCB>0 gate -- harmless since B9.0 makes no positive claim; reconsider before any B9.1 confirmatory use.)

dry_run.substrate: SMALL SYNTHETIC toy (NOT Lee2019, NOT validation); plumbing / contract-feasibility ONLY; NO scientific evidence, NO power claim
dry_run.expectation: VALID_* run the exact null + well-formed states (boundary->ALERT, underpowered->NO_ACTIONABLE via size gate); every refuse world REFUSED before any p-value (ran_test False) with its PRIMARY reason present; states disjoint + in the declared set
dry_run.result: B9_0_DRYRUN_OK (15 worlds; plumbing only, NO scientific claim)
dry_run.disclosed_coverage: SAMPLER_INVALID + the contract-level nsup<min_support branch are reachable DEFENSIVE fail-closed states a valid balanced contract cannot synthetically trigger; verified reachable by code inspection; guard real-data pathologies in B9.1

hard_stops: Y_design is an observed/generated post-hoc Y
C is a session label not a randomized condition
prior imbalance repaired instead of invalidating the contract
an invalid world reaches p-value testing
randomization support too small but the certifier still alerts
not_authorized: B9.1 (real prospective acquisition OR an existing genuinely-pre-randomized dataset -- a SEPARATE future authorization)
